case_title: DARNEY MCPERSON VS. GEORGE E COOK

docket_entries.description: MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY GEORGE E COOK SET FOR JUN-05-2020 IS CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO AUG-21-2020 AT 3:30 PM IN 506. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,100.00 FILED BY MCPERSON, DARNEY AS TO DEFENDANT COOK, GEORGE E DBA   BRYANT TRANSMISSION CENTER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-10-2020 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
RETURN MAIL SMALL CLAIMS MOTION - CONTINUE ORDER SENT TO DEFENDANT UNABLE TO FORWARD

REMARK: NOTICE OF CONTINUANCE ON MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY GEORGE E COOK SET FOR JAN-07-2021 AND CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO MAY-13-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN 506. RETURNED - NO SUCH NUMBER - UNABLE TO FORWARD.

REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS MOTION - CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 07/17/20. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $0.00) SERVED JAN-07-2020, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT COOK, GEORGE E DBA   BRYANT TRANSMISSION CENTER
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-10-2020 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCPERSON, DARNEY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COOK, GEORGE E DBA   BRYANT TRANSMISSION CENTER $2,100.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,150.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY GEORGE E COOK SET FOR JAN-07-2021 IS CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO MAY-13-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN 506.
ORDER FOR MOTION TO VACATE IS DENIED: NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT

REMARK: RETURN MAIL- MOTION DENIED MAILED TO GEORGE COOK-NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED/UNABLE TO FORWARD
